_meta.purpose: Real visual identity of each Albaik (البيك) hero product, grounded in vision on the clean product_food reference photos (media_class.json) + a web search of Albaik's real menu. A Saudi who eats Albaik must recognize the product from identity_dna alone.

vision_refs.كرسبي بيك: clients/albaik/media/C7jthkloMRo.jpg (single-fillet read of the broasted-fillet form), C0mM-Z2Il0S.jpg (broasted texture)

_meta.signature_law: Albaik's single most recognizable visual cue is the WHITE GARLIC SAUCE (ثومية) — a thick, glossy, off-white fresh-garlic mayonnaise. Every Albaik product reads as Albaik because of the broasted golden-crispy chicken + that white garlic sauce. Never render a generic sesame burger bun, generic mayo, or grilled-only chicken as Albaik.

دبل بيك.identity_dna: Two thick BROASTED golden-crispy chicken breast fillets stacked one above the other, each with a craggy deep-fried crumb crust, separated and crowned by melted cheese that drapes over the edges, bright-green sliced dill pickles peeking between the layers, and Albaik's twin sauces — the white garlic ثومية and the pinkish-orange cocktail (مسحب) sauce — oozing down the sides. The bun is Albaik's own pale, soft, SEEDLESS round bun (a plain glossy top crown, NOT a sesame burger bun), generously domed, against the brand's red backdrop.
components: two broasted crispy chicken breast fillets
دبل بيك.bread: Albaik's pale soft seedless round bun, plain glossy crown (NOT a sesame burger bun)

سوبر رول.identity_dna: A long, fat hand-held wrap rolled in a thin pale flatbread — either the griddled صاج flatbread with dark golden grill stripes or a soft flour tortilla — gripped in the fist and cut to reveal the stuffing: broasted golden-crispy chicken strips (chicken variant) or breaded crispy shrimp (the 8-جمبري variant), tumbling out with shredded white coleslaw, bright-green sliced pickles, crisp golden fries, and Albaik's white garlic ثومية plus a streak of orange cocktail sauce. Reads instantly as the oversized, overstuffed Albaik super wrap.
components: broasted crispy chicken strips OR 8 crispy shrimp
سوبر رول.bread: thin pale griddled صاج flatbread with grill stripes (or soft flour tortilla)

كومبو بيك.identity_dna: A full meal plated on a warm wooden board: a pile of 5 BROASTED golden-crispy boneless chicken-breast strips (بيكيز) with their craggy fried crust, a soft pale Albaik bun alongside, a wooden bowl heaped with golden curly-cut Albaik fries, two small dip cups — one white garlic ثومية, one red ketchup/cocktail — and an iced Pepsi can (with the البيك co-branded can in some shots). The hero is the broasted chicken-breast strips and the white garlic sauce; everything sits on the warm-wood-and-brand-color stage.
كومبو بيك.bread: soft pale Albaik bun served alongside (combo plating, not assembled in a sandwich)

بيكيز.identity_dna: A loose pile of BROASTED golden-crispy boneless, skinless chicken-breast strips — irregular, knobbly, deeply golden tenders with a thick craggy fried crumb crust, served bare on a warm wooden board (no bun). 5 pieces per portion. Available regular or spicy (حرّاق, with the red chili-flame badge). Always plated to show the crunch and steam, with Albaik's white garlic ثومية and orange cocktail (مسحب) sauce as the dip alongside.
components: 5 broasted crispy boneless skinless chicken-breast strips
بيكيز.bread: none (served as strips on a board, dips alongside)

كرسبي بيك.identity_dna: Albaik's single-fillet crispy chicken sandwich: ONE thick BROASTED golden-crispy chicken-breast fillet with its craggy deep-fried crumb crust, topped with a slice of melted cheese, bright-green sliced pickles, shredded coleslaw, and a glossy layer of Albaik's white garlic ثومية with a streak of orange cocktail sauce, all in Albaik's pale soft SEEDLESS round bun (plain glossy crown, NOT a sesame burger bun). The simpler, single-fillet sibling of the Double Beek — same broasted crunch, same signature white garlic sauce.
components: one broasted crispy chicken breast fillet
كرسبي بيك.bread: Albaik's pale soft seedless round bun, plain glossy crown (NOT a sesame burger bun)
